---
title: "Overlap report"
author: "Proteomics and Proteostasis Lab"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d/%m/%y')`"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
params:
  data:
    label: "Upload PSM file:"
    input: file
    value: NULL
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      fig.align = "center")
```

```{r}
# Load libraries
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
# Load data
df <- readr::read_delim(params$data,
                        delim = "\t",
                        escape_double = FALSE,
                        trim_ws = TRUE)

# Filters per condition and fraction
psm <- df %>%
  filter(`Is Unique` == "TRUE") %>%
  mutate(Fraction = str_extract(Spectrum, "M\\d+"))

number_of_fractions <- n_distinct(psm$Fraction)

# Set builds
peptide_sets <- psm %>%
  group_by(Fraction) %>%
  summarise(peptides = list(unique(Peptide))) %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(sub("M", "", Fraction)))

protein_sets <- psm %>%
  group_by(Fraction) %>%
  summarise(proteins = list(unique(Protein))) %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(sub("M", "", Fraction)))

# Jaccard functions
jaccard_index <- function(set_df, i, j, col = 2) {
  set1 <- set_df[[col]][[i]]
  set2 <- set_df[[col]][[j]]
  inter <- length(intersect(set1, set2))
  union <- length(union(set1, set2))
  if (union == 0) return(NA)
  return((inter / union) * 100)
}

jaccard_matrix <- function(sets_df, col = 2) {
  n <- nrow(sets_df)
  mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = n, ncol = n)
  rownames(mat) <- sets_df$Fraction
  colnames(mat) <- sets_df$Fraction
  for (i in 1:n) {
    for (j in i:n) {
      score <- jaccard_index(sets_df, i, j, col)
      mat[i, j] <- score
      mat[j, i] <- score
    }
  }
  return(mat)
}

matrix_peptides <- jaccard_matrix(peptide_sets)
matrix_proteins <- jaccard_matrix(protein_sets)
```

### Overall information
```{r}
total_psm    <- nrow(df)
filtered_psm <- nrow(psm)
n_fractions  <- number_of_fractions
unique_pep   <- length(unique(psm$Peptide))
unique_prot  <- length(unique(psm$Protein))

t(data.frame(total_psm,
             filtered_psm,
             n_fractions,
             unique_pep,
             unique_prot)) %>%
  kbl() %>%
  kable_paper("hover", full_width = F, font_size = 19)
```

<br>
```{r fig.height=5, fig.width=8}
psm %>%
  group_by(Fraction) %>%
  summarise(n_peptides = n_distinct(Peptide),
            n_proteins = n_distinct(Protein)) %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(sub("M", "", Fraction))) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(!Fraction, names_to = "type", values_to = "n") %>%
  mutate(Fraction = factor(Fraction, levels = unique(Fraction))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(Fraction, n, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.7, color = "grey20") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            angle = 90,
            vjust = 0.5,
            hjust = -0.2,
            size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("n_peptides" = "steelblue",
                               "n_proteins" = "darkolivegreen"),
                    labels = c("Unique peptides", "Unique proteins")) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),
                     limits = c(0, max(psm %>%
                                        group_by(Fraction) %>%
                                        summarise(n_peptides = n_distinct(Peptide),
                                                  n_proteins = n_distinct(Protein)) %>%
                                        tidyr::pivot_longer(!Fraction, names_to = "type", values_to = "n") %>%
                                        pull(n)) * 1.1)) +  # +10% arriba
  labs(x = "Fraction", y = "Count", fill = NULL,
       title = "Unique peptides and proteins per fraction")
```

### Jaccard index — Peptides
<br>
```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=7}
# Heatmap peptides
mat_long_pep <- as.data.frame(matrix_peptides) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Fraction_x") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(!Fraction_x,
                      names_to = "Fraction_y",
                      values_to = "jaccard") %>%
  mutate(Fraction_x = factor(Fraction_x, levels = rownames(matrix_peptides)),
         Fraction_y = factor(Fraction_y, levels = rownames(matrix_peptides))) %>%
  # Filtrar solo el triángulo inferior
  filter(as.numeric(Fraction_x) >= as.numeric(Fraction_y))

# Crear el heatmap solo del triángulo inferior
ggplot(mat_long_pep, aes(Fraction_x, Fraction_y, fill = jaccard)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(jaccard, 2)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue",
                      name = "Jaccard (%)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
       title = "Peptide overlap between fractions (Jaccard %)")
```

### Jaccard index — Proteins
<br>
```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=7}
# Heatmap proteins (triángulo inferior)
mat_long_prot <- as.data.frame(matrix_proteins) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Fraction_x") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(!Fraction_x,
                      names_to = "Fraction_y",
                      values_to = "jaccard") %>%
  mutate(Fraction_x = factor(Fraction_x, levels = rownames(matrix_proteins)),
         Fraction_y = factor(Fraction_y, levels = rownames(matrix_proteins))) %>%
  # Filtrar solo el triángulo inferior
  filter(as.numeric(Fraction_x) >= as.numeric(Fraction_y))

# Crear el heatmap solo del triángulo inferior
ggplot(mat_long_prot, aes(Fraction_x, Fraction_y, fill = jaccard)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(jaccard, 2)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "darkolivegreen",
                      name = "Jaccard (%)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
       title = "Protein overlap between fractions (Jaccard %)")
```
